subcodes.title: Address to the friends at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-03-08
subcodes.first_line: I wish very much to speak with you all, but I am not feeling well… I have been travelling for two years and a half. Nowhere was I ill except here.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من خیلی میخواهم با شماها صحبت بدارم لکن صحتم مساعد نیست دعا کنید صحت تامه ای حاصل شود
